meaning: n.(花样滑冰)前外一周半跳
examples: The 1961 Peace Prize was awarded to Dag Hammerskjold, and the 1931 Literature Prize was awarded to the Swedish poet Erik Axel Karlfeldt.
Few South Koreans know the difference between a triple axel and a triple salchow.
While working out the worm's sense of smell, Dr. Bargmann fell in love with another olfactory researcher, Richard Axel.
Axel Springer, publisher of Bild, is reinvesting German newspaper profits in online classified-ad services.
He and his group, along with Caltech's Axel Scherer , added a few clever twists.
